subject: Shattered crystal and iridescent glass shards erupting in a dark space
description: The image is an abstract explosion of shattering crystal: large faceted shards and countless small fragments fill the frame, each catching and refracting light into iridescent rainbows. The background is dark — deep purple-brown — with a suggestion of a circular or spiral decorative element at the upper right edge. The overall feel is of a single violent instant frozen in time, all glittering edges and prismatic refraction. No figures are present.
foreground: Large crystal shard at center, smaller fragments radiating outward
background: Dark purple-brown void with a decorative circular motif
emotion: violent rupture; something precious or binding has been destroyed
